**What is Parallel Construction?**
Parallel construction is a law enforcement technique in which investigators build a separate, independent evidentiary trail to support a criminal prosecution, intentionally concealing the original source of the information that triggered the investigation. 

This practice is most commonly associated with cases where the initial tip or evidence stems from highly sensitive sources, such as classified intelligence gathering (e.g., NSA surveillance, FISA warrants), advanced investigative technologies
